title: Plugin installation accepted traversal-like package names escaping extensions dir
description: The unscopedPackageName function strips only the npm scope prefix (e.g., '@evil/') from package names, and safeDirName replaces forward slashes with double underscores but does not block '..' segments or backslashes. A malicious plugin package with a name like '@evil/..' resolves to pluginId '..' after unscoping, and safeDirName('..') returns '..' unchanged since it contains no slashes. The resulting targetDir is path.join(extensionsDir, '..'), which escapes the extensions directory and writes files to the parent directory.
